dialogueChunks.intro: There has been a falling out between us and our allies, {player_name}. {quest_origin} was broken, and accusations are flying in both directions.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} was our negotiator, and they say {target_npc} deliberately caused the breach. But {target_npc} claims we were the ones at fault. Meanwhile, the {enemy_type} are circling both settlements while we argue.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we do not resolve the {quest_focus} quickly, two allies could become enemies while the {quest_threat} picks us apart. Can you look into this with fresh eyes?

playerResponses.text: I will hear both sides and sort it out.
Someone has to keep the peace. I will try.
Your quarrels are not my problem.

dialogueChunks.intro: The {quest_focus} {location_hint} has become a flashpoint, {player_name}. Both our settlement and our neighbors claim rights to it, and people on both sides are arming up.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} tried to calm things down, but {target_npc} brought armed workers to the site yesterday. Our people nearly came to blows. The {enemy_type} have been raiding both sides, which makes everyone angrier.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need an outsider to walk between both camps and find a solution {quest_time_pressure}. Will you help before the {quest_threat} turns into something we cannot take back?

playerResponses.text: I will go speak to both sides.
Violence will not solve anything. I will mediate.

dialogueChunks.intro: Our supplies were sabotaged, {player_name}. Deliberately. And the only people with access besides us are our allies.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} does not believe {target_npc}'s people would do this, but the evidence points their way. Someone left {quest_item} residue near the {quest_focus}, and that material comes from {location_hint}. If this was truly sabotage by allies, everything changes.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need the truth before the {quest_threat} destroys an alliance that took years to build. Investigate and find out who really did this.

playerResponses.text: I will find out who is really behind this.
Could be a setup. I will investigate.
It was probably just bad luck.
